# GH Admin — Full Architecture Reference

## Stack

- **Runtime**: Cloudflare Workers (nodejs_compat)
- **Framework**: TanStack Start v1 (file-based routing, server functions)
- **Auth**: Better Auth with GitHub OAuth (App + PKCE)
- **Database**: Cloudflare D1 (SQLite) via Drizzle ORM
- **AI Agent**: Cloudflare Agents SDK — `AIChatAgent` extended as `GitHubAgent` Durable Object
- **AI SDK**: Vercel AI SDK v5 (`streamText`, `convertToModelMessages`, `stepCountIs`)
- **API layer**: oRPC (`@orpc/server`, `@orpc/client`) — contract-first typed HTTP procedures
- **Generative UI**: json-render (`@json-render/core`, `@json-render/react`, `@json-render/shadcn`)
- **UI**: React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui components
- **Workflows**: Cloudflare Workflows (`AdminActionWorkflow`) — human-in-the-loop approval

## Key File Paths

### Server
- `server/index.ts` — Worker entrypoint; exports `GitHubAgent`, `AdminActionWorkflow`
- `server/auth/index.ts` — Better Auth instance; token push hook to GitHubAgent DO
- `server/durable-objects/github-agent.ts` — `GitHubAgent` extends `AIChatAgent`; SQLite for tokens + preferences; `onChatMessage` with json-render stream
- `server/agent/tools/index.ts` — GitHub tools via `implementTool(contract, { execute })`
- `server/agent/tools/contracts.ts` — oRPC contracts (single source of truth for tool schemas)
- `server/orpc/router.ts` — oRPC router (preferences procedures)
- `server/orpc/middleware.ts` — `base` context + `authorized` middleware (Better Auth session)
- `server/data-access-layer/preferences.ts` — DO stub calls for user preferences
- `server/functions/preferences.ts` — `getThemePreference` server function
- `server/workflows/admin-action.ts` — `AdminActionWorkflow` with `step.waitForEvent`
- `server/functions/workflows.ts` — `triggerAdminAction`, `approveAdminAction` server functions

### Client
- `client/routes/__root.tsx` — session + theme loaded in `beforeLoad`; ThemeProvider wraps body
- `client/routes/index.tsx` — login/home page
- `client/routes/dashboard/route.tsx` — auth guard + AppShell layout (menubar + drawers)
- `client/routes/dashboard/index.tsx` — Command Center overview with workflow action cards
- `client/routes/dashboard/chat.tsx` — full-page ChatInterface
- `client/routes/api/orpc.$.ts` — oRPC HTTP catch-all handler
- `client/components/layout/app-menubar.tsx` — VSCode-style top bar (View menu, Settings/theme, panel toggles)
- `client/components/layout/nav-drawer.tsx` — left nav drawer
- `client/components/layout/ai-drawer.tsx` — right AI assistant drawer
- `client/components/ui/chat/interface.tsx` — `ChatInterface` with `useAgentChat`, json-render `MessageParts`
- `client/json-render/registry.tsx` — json-render React registry
- `client/json-render/renderer.tsx` — `ExplorerRenderer` (StateProvider + Renderer)
- `client/lib/orpc.ts` — oRPC typed client

### Shared
- `shared/json-render/catalog.ts` — `explorerCatalog` definition

## oRPC Router Shape

```
preferences
  .get    — input: { key: string }         → string | null
  .set    — input: { key: string, value: string } → void
  .getAll — (no input)                      → Record<string, string>
```

All procedures require a valid Better Auth session (via `authorized` middleware).

## json-render Catalog Components

Shadcn base: Stack, Card, Grid, Heading, Separator, Accordion, Progress, Skeleton, Badge, Alert

Custom: Text, Metric, Table, Link, BarChart, LineChart, Tabs, TabContent, Callout, Timeline, PieChart, RadioGroup, SelectInput, TextInput, Button

Generate system prompt via `explorerCatalog.prompt()`.
Stream transformation: `pipeJsonRender(result.toUIMessageStream())` inside `createUIMessageStream`.
Client hook: `useJsonRenderMessage(message.parts)` → `{ spec, hasSpec }`.

## Wrangler Bindings

| Binding | Type | Purpose |
|---------|------|---------|
| `GitHubAgent` | Durable Object (SQLite) | Stateful AI agent per user |
| `AdminActionWorkflow` | Workflow | Human-in-the-loop admin actions |
| `GH_ADMIN_D1_PRIMARY` | D1 | Auth + app database |
| `OAUTH_KV` | KV | OAuth token storage |
| `GH_AGENT_TOOL_CALLS` | Analytics Engine | Tool call telemetry |
| `AUTH_R2_BUCKET` | R2 | Auth data storage (dev/prod) |

## Auth Flow

1. User signs in via GitHub App OAuth (PKCE, offline access)
2. Better Auth `afterSignIn` hook calls `GitHubAgent.setTokens()` via DO stub
3. DO stores tokens in SQLite; schedules proactive refresh 5 min before expiry
4. Route `beforeLoad` in `dashboard/route.tsx` enforces session; redirects to `/` if missing

## Workflow: Human-in-the-Loop

1. AI suggests destructive action → dashboard shows "Requires confirmation" card
2. `triggerAdminAction()` server function creates a Workflow instance
3. `step.waitForEvent('human-approval', { timeout: '24 hours' })` pauses execution
4. User approves/denies via `approveAdminAction()` → event sent to workflow instance
5. Workflow resumes, executes or records denial
